cases.description: A number passed through unchanged -> the number itself
TRUE -> 1, per Microsoft's N doc example table
FALSE -> 0, per the same doc's TRUE/FALSE convention
Text (even numeric-looking text like "7") -> 0, per doc example N("7") = 0 and N("Even") = 0: 'anything else' converts to 0
A date -> its underlying serial number, per doc example N(4/17/2011)=40650
cases.expected_note: 2024-01-01 is Excel serial day 45292 under the 1900 date system.
